title: Reasons Why You Should Avoid Betting on Johnson Controls (JCI)
text: Weakness in the Global Products segment, increasing costs and unfavorable foreign-currency movement are weighing on Johnson Controls' (JCI) operations.

title: Time to Buy This Dividend Stock on a Dip?
text: The company's growth is good, but not as good as previously expected. Management's guidance implies an improvement in the second half of 2024, and orders and backlog growth support this argument.

title: Johnson Controls Shows How Artificial Intelligence, IoT, Cloud Computing Rapidly Transforming the Future of Smart Buildings
text: CORK, Ireland , Dec. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The pressure to meet global climate targets has never been greater and with buildings accounting for 40% of global greenhouse gas emissions, there is an urgent need to advance sustainable building technology to help enterprises meet net zero goals while accommodating for continued growth. "The Smart Building of the Future," a new paper from Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) outlines how smart buildings equipped with advanced technologies like artificial intelligence, IoT, cloud and cybersecurity will help enterprises create a future where our buildings integrate with human and environmental ecosystems.

title: Johnson Controls Using Green-Dominance To Pivot To High-Value Services
text: Johnson Controls International is a leading multinational in building automation, with a strong focus on green buildings and net-zero initiatives. The company is well-positioned to benefit from the growing demand for green solutions in heating and cooling, as well as the expansion of semiconductor fabs and data centers. JCI's Global Products segment, including industrial refrigeration and small commercial buildings, is experiencing strong growth, while its Building Solutions segment is shifting toward higher-margin services.

title: Johnson Controls Stock Drops As Global Sales Slump, Cyberattack Weighed On Earnings
text: Johnson Controls International PLC (JCI) shares fell sharply Tuesday as the provider of building technologies and software posted worse-than-expected results on a drop in global sales and the fallout from a cyberattack in September.

title: Johnson Controls (JCI) Q4 Earnings Miss, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Johnson Controls' (JCI) fiscal fourth-quarter results benefit from strength in the HVAC & Controls and Fire & Security businesses.

title: Johnson Controls International plc (JCI) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call December 12, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Jim Lucas - VP, IR George Oliver - Chairman and CEO Olivier Leonetti - CFO Conference Call Participants Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Scott Davis - Melius Research Steve Tusa - JPMorgan Julian Mitchell - Barclays Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Andy Kaplowitz - Citigroup Noah Kaye - Oppenheimer Joe O'Dea - Wells Fargo Deane Dray - RBC Capital Markets Andrew Obin - Bank of America Brett Linzey - Mizuho Americas Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Johnson Controls Fourth Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. All participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: Compared to Estimates, Johnson Controls (JCI) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Johnson Controls (JCI) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Johnson Controls (JCI) Lags Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Johnson Controls (JCI) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.05 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.09 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.99 per share a year ago.

title: Johnson Controls sees continued order momentum but profit dips
text: Johnson Controls International PLC said it continued to see strong order momentum as it reported a modest increase in fourth quarter sales although net income dropped.  The Cork, Ireland-based builder said in the three months ended September 30, sales rose 3% to $6.91 billion from $6.73 billion the year prior, while net income dropped to $549 million from $809 million.

title: Johnson Controls Reports Q4 and FY23 Results Highlighted by Strong Sales Growth and Margin Expansion; Initiates FY24 Guidance
text: Q4 reported sales increased 3% versus prior year and up 2% organically; full year reported sales up 6% and increased 8% organically Q4 GAAP EPS of $0.80; Q4 Adjusted EPS of $1.05, including a $0.04 headwind from the cyber incident, up 6% versus prior year; full year GAAP EPS of $2.69; full year Adjusted EPS of $3.50, up 17% versus prior year. Results include a $0.04 headwind from the cyber incident.

title: Johnson Controls Named a Leader in Energy Management Software
text: Johnson Controls recognized by independent industry analyst firm as a leader in Energy Management Software Recognized for capabilities and features of its OpenBlue suite of smart building solutions Scored among the highest in operations and control, energy monitoring and reporting, and innovation and product strategy CORK, Ireland , Dec. 11, 2023  /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), the global leader for smart, healthy and sustainable buildings, today announced it was named a leader in energy management software by independent industry analyst firm Verdantix in its Green Quadrant: Energy Management Software 2023 report. "Buildings contribute nearly 40% of global emissions and new levels of efficiency and sustainability can only be achieved through digitalization," said Johnson Controls Chief Technology Officer Vijay Sankaran.

title: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About Johnson Controls (JCI) Q4 Earnings
text: Beyond analysts' top -and-bottom-line estimates for Johnson Controls (JCI), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended September 2023.

title: Johnson Controls Announces Quarterly Dividend
text: CORK, Ireland , Dec. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI), the global leader in smart, healthy and sustainable buildings, has approved a regular quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share of common stock, payable on Jan. 12, 2024, to shareholders of record at the close of business on Dec. 18, 2023. Johnson Controls has paid a consecutive dividend since 1887.
